query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO match_outcomes (
    game_type,
     user_id, 
     start_time, 
     game_seed, 
     match_id, 
     recv_time, 
    score, 
    data_version, 
    last_action, 
    state_data, 
    is_finished, 
    game_over_reason, 
    elo_score_percent, 
            own_elo,
        opponent_score_percent,
        opponent_elo,
        new_elo
)
VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,?,?,?)
